title: DokiCraft
description: This mod adds Dokibird related stuffs to the game!!
body:
![Dokicraft 1.1 Update Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bea124bd6060820bcdea5adcd6ad71d055356452.png)

# **This Mod adds Dokibird related stuffs to the game!**
**such as Dragoons, Doki Amber Doge, Tomato Doki, and Crowki!!**

this mod requires **Geckolib** in able to run the mod.




_(this is a fan made mod made for Dokibird and her community)_
